---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: Y-Bro
---

## What happened

A clear description of the unexpected behavior.

## What you expected

A clear description of what you thought would happen.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `/claudemap-coach:<command>` with `<arguments>`
2. ...
3. See the issue at step ...

## Run stats from the failed run

Paste the `## Run Stats` block that the command printed (or note "command crashed before printing stats"). The token counts and model ID help a lot.

```
## Run Stats
...
```

## Environment

- Claude Code version:
- Operating system:
- Plugin version: (from `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` — should be `0.5.x` for current main)

## Additional context

Anything else worth mentioning — screenshots, terminal output, the topic you were trying to roadmap, etc.
